title: GlobalTech Corp: Official Press Release — Accelerate AI Initiative
snippet: GlobalTech announces Accelerate AI initiative: 800 employees moving to new AI subsidiary, 400 offered voluntary separation with full severance.
content: FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE — GlobalTech Corporation Announces 'Accelerate AI' Strategic Initiative. San Jose, CA — GlobalTech Corporation (NASDAQ: GTC) today detailed its 'Accelerate AI' initiative, a strategic realignment designed to position the company at the forefront of AI-native enterprise solutions. Key elements: (1) Formation of TechForward Inc., a new subsidiary that will employ approximately 800 current GlobalTech team members working on AI, machine learning, and next-generation cloud infrastructure. These team members will transfer with their current compensation packages intact. (2) A Voluntary Separation Program for approximately 400 employees in legacy product lines, offering 6 months salary, extended healthcare, career coaching, and priority rehire consideration. CEO Diana Torres said: 'This is about investing in our future, not cutting costs. We're growing revenue — up 3.1% this year — and this restructuring directs talent toward our highest-growth opportunities. Not a single employee is being involuntarily terminated.'
